programme.title: Corazon: Ang Unang Aswang
programme.desc: In desperation, Corazón and Daniel resort to mystic rituals to have a child. When their child dies, Corazón gets revenge by inflicting pain on others.

programme.title: The B Side
programme.desc: The host leads conversations exploring current trends in sports, fashion and entertainment; she delves into diverse aspects of popular culture with leading personalities.

programme.title: Mission Unstapabol: The Don Identity
programme.desc: In an effort to clear his name, Don Roberto Fortun assembles a motley crew to help him steal a pearl from his conniving brother.

programme.title: You're My Boss
programme.desc: A woman looking for acceptance, love and appreciation finds what she is looking for from her personal assistant.

programme.title: 3Pol Trobol: Huli Ka Balbon!
programme.desc: After discovering an anomaly in his agency, the executive director is ambushed, but he manages to pass on what he knows to Apollo. Before Apollo can report to the authorities, he becomes the primary suspect in killing his former boss.

programme.title: Ang tange kong pag-Ibig
programme.desc: A woman hires an investigator to tail her cheating husband. However, the detective soon falls in love with his target's lover, a florist who inadvertently becomes the target of a crime syndicate.

programme.title: Ang Joker At Ang Pistolero
programme.desc: Two fraudsters try to dupe a big gambling syndicate. However, when the syndicate comes to know their real identities, they flee to save their lives.

programme.title: Can We Still Be Friends?
programme.desc: Digs and Sam break up and keep tabs on each other's relationships.

programme.title: Si Malakas at Si Maganda
programme.desc: Oyo, a man with telekinetic powers, falls in love with Anna, a reporter who enlists his help in her investigation.

programme.title: Captain Barbell
programme.desc: A janitor (Ogie Alcasid) who has a crush on a teacher (Regine Velasquez) turns into a superhero.

programme.title: Zaldong Tisoy
programme.desc: Zaldo plans to kill Donya Pacita because of her cruelty towards her countrymen. However, his plan falters when he discovers her true personality.

programme.title: Daddy Goon
programme.desc: Sergeant Santisima, a kindhearted policeman, vows to save his children and the other squatters from the cruelty of the owner of the land they all live on.

programme.title: White Lady
programme.desc: A college girl is being followed by a white specter. To discover why the spirit is so tortured, the student delves into the history of her school and uncovers secrets that may have drastic consequences.

programme.title: I Love You, Hater
programme.desc: Joko and Zoey, two people struggling to make it through life, compete for a chance to work as a personal assistant. Along the way, they grow close and form a special bond with one another.

programme.title: Captain Barbell
programme.desc: A janitor (Ogie Alcasid) who has a crush on a teacher (Regine Velasquez) turns into a superhero.

programme.title: Malaya
programme.desc: Fresh out of college, Malaya flies to Italy to live with her mother who is an overseas worker. She meets and falls for Iago, a Filipino worker, who becomes a wedge between her freedom and dreams.

programme.title: Apoy sa Karagatan
programme.desc: Johnny Laguna, a private detective, decides to turn into a bounty hunter when the town's richest man decides to give a huge amount of money to the person who can rescue his wife from the abductors.

programme.title: T.2.
programme.desc: A volunteer taking care of a young girl learns she is being stalked by Engkantos putting their lives at risk.

programme.title: Hihintayin Kita sa Langit
programme.desc: Milo begins to feel jealous of his adopted brother, Gabriel, who was originally an urchin, even as Milo's sister, Carmina, grows fond of him.

programme.title: Ang Pulubi at ang Prinsesa
programme.desc: A poor young girl selflessly risks her life to save a rich girl; in gratitude the rich girl's mother welcomes her into their family.

programme.title: The Breakup Playlist
programme.desc: A musician and a rock singer develop feelings for each other as they collaborate on a song.

programme.title: Anghel Dela Guardia
programme.desc: Theresa is destined to give birth to the child of Lucifer. To prevent this and ensure her safety, her guardian angel, Gabriel, watches over and protects her.

programme.desc: Two former high school friends renew their relationship when they make the happy discovery that they are now neighbors.

programme.title: WTF Is Crypto?
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the foundations of Cryptocurrency and talk to the local crypto pioneers who risked it all.

programme.title: WTF Is Crypto?
programme.desc: Now we know why Crypto is such a big deal, through this episode we’ll meet the family behind one of NZ’s biggest Crypto success stories. We’ll dispel some crypto myths and cover the basics of how to get on board.

programme.title: WTF Is Crypto?
programme.desc: CEO Aaron McDonald and Co-Founder Brooke Howard-Smith tell us how they created a multi-million dollar NFT business here in Aotearoa and are collaborating with international superstars.

programme.title: WTF Is Crypto?
programme.desc: It's an inspirational episode, we spend time with the team taking Māori to the metaverse and check-in on a couple of local disrupters focused on making digital worlds where everyone feels like they can belong.

programme.title: WTF Is Crypto?
programme.desc: What if Bitcoin mining could actually save the world? Over this episode, we meet the local company on a mission to use it to help solve global warming.

programme.title: WTF Is Crypto?
programme.desc: We profile Kaye-Maree Dunn, an innovator developing digital data sovereignty and we find out how NFTs can allow us to own our own artificial intelligence. It's an episode that will blow your mind.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ""living in the future"!

programme.desc: A killer guns down a rapper outside a New Orleans Waffle House. A string of robberies in Arkansas baffles police until they use video to catch the robbers.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S5)
programme.desc: Somewhere in the Atlantic Ocean, Matt and Joe are caught in open water, where a nightmare scenario of a sunken ship is made worse by prowling sharks.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S7)
programme.desc: At Barajas Airport in Madrid, the Civil Guard uncovers something shocking inside a woman’s suitcase. In Barcelona, a mistake catches a couple out.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S7)
programme.desc: In Barcelona, a man is caught with a significant amount of cash. At the Port of Algeciras, the Civil Guard uncovers cigarettes hidden in a lorry.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It’s their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Gold Rush (Specials) (S16)
programme.desc: Parker's season rides on a critical decision on which ground to open next. Doumitt designs a new gold coin, and Parker cashes in a pile of gold.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters (S8)
programme.desc: Increasingly desperate, The Mooka Boys beg for scraps in an old mine, but a discovery could change their fortunes. Machinery failures hit The Cheals.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Tony spends millions on a new piece of ground for Mike. Parker buys a Golden Goose to turn the season around, and Kevin struggles with a recent hire.

programme.desc: Polar ice descends and each Skipper must choose flight or fight. The Saga is in danger of sinking & Jake must act fast to save his crew.

programme.desc: Using data from new experiments, experts construct a CGI fight to the death between two apex predators: the great white shark and Nile crocodile.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Kathryn Robinson brings you today's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter.

programme.title: If You're Listening
programme.desc: Scam compounds filled with hundreds of thousands of trafficked workers are rampant through Myanmar. China has had enough of their citizens being kidnapped, but can they stop the tide?

programme.title: Australian Story
programme.desc: How Love on the Spectrum and Austin's Michael Theo found his voice and became a global star.

programme.title: Creative Types With Virginia Trioli
programme.desc: American Ballet Dancer, now artistic director, David Hallberg shows how he has taken The Australian Ballet company to a new level of power and style, sharing lessons he learned from a catastrophic foot injury. (Final)

programme.title: Art Works
programme.desc: We visit The Torch, a program for First Nations artists with experience of the prison system; head to VIVID; meld miniatures, theatre, live cinema and UFOs with re:group collective; and meet Nigerien guitarist Mdou Moctar.

programme.title: Iconic Australia
programme.desc: Myths of federation are unpacked with stories of contemporary locals who are working hard to right the wrongs of European settlers, and survive in a land of floods, droughts and bushfires.

programme.title: Shaun Micallef's Origin Odyssey
programme.desc: Host Shaun Micallef travels to Switzerland with radio presenter and comedian Michael 'Wippa' Wipfli to understand more about his Swiss heritage.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien
programme.desc: Lorna Dunkley brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: It's easy entertaining with The Cook Up, and Adam has enlisted stylist Lucy Tweed and comedian Adam Spencer to help cover everything from soup to nuts.

programme.title: If You're Listening
programme.desc: Scam compounds filled with hundreds of thousands of trafficked workers are rampant through Myanmar. China has had enough of their citizens being kidnapped, but can they stop the tide?

programme.title: ABC National News
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Lorna Dunkley.

Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: Creative Types With Virginia Trioli

And so begins their adventure in Paldea Region, setting their sights on their Terastallization debut!

programme.title: On The Red Dot - EP 11
programme.desc: Choir Conductor, Lim Huimin and trauma cleaner Rahman Razali reimagine what the last 24 hours of their life would look like.

programme.desc: It only takes a split second for a loved one with dementia to vanish. In this two-part special, Munah Bagharib investigates why people with dementia go missing and what can be done to keep them safe.

programme.desc: A masked e-bike rider preys on lone women across Singapore's neighbourhoods. Watch how officers from Bedok Division work with victims who came forward, to unmask and apprehend this elusive serial offender.

programme.desc: IR Iran remain masters of AFC qualifying. Uzbekistan head to the World Cup for the first time.

programme.title: Ainsley's Fantastic Flavours S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Join Britain’s happiest chef, Chef Ainsley HarriottJ, as he criss-crosses the UK in search of deserving occasions, and then whips up delicious dishes worthy of a celebration.

programme.title: Unbeatable - EP 14
programme.desc: Some answers are good, but only one is UNBEATABLE in this knock-out quiz tournament where contestants could win up to 10,000.

programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Moneyball S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Ian Wright presents the game show where the difference between winning life-changing money and going home with nothing rests entirely on the roll of a ball.

programme.desc: Luke Nguyen’s India takes viewers on a journey of the senses through India where food, religion, and rich culture go hand in hand. In the brand new series, Luke circumnavigates Southern India discovering the cuisines, sounds, and colours of this captivating region.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Final: Spain vs Argentina
programme.desc: Reigning European champions Spain take on defending world champions Argentina in the 2026 FIFA World Cup Final. Spain's trademark possession football meets Argentina's attacking flair as two footballing giants battle for the biggest prize in world football.

programme.title: SHERO - EP 17
programme.desc: Yinchen breaks up with Ruixiang. Yalian tells Yinchen about the death of Ruixiang's ex-fiancee Xiaomin, hoping Yinchen could give him another chance. When Yinxi is assaulted and the sisters are in danger, Ruixiang saves them, gaining back Yinchen's trust. Yinxi finally remembers Junsheng and how she feels towards him. Yinchen accompanies Ruixiang on his work trip, where he planned a surprise...

programme.title: SHERO - EP 18
programme.desc: Yinxi remembers that she was investigating their parents' death before she was attacked. Feihong realizes that Yinchen and Yinxi are the daughters of Zhang Tianyou Meihua admits that she wants Yinxi dead. The police investigate RSB for illegal activities. In order to protect his wife and son, Feihong decides to surrender himself to the police...

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 21 少年歌行
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. His first heroic deed does not go as planned since he ended up owing the owner Xiao Se a debt for the damages to his place. Left with no choice, Lei Wu Jie takes Xiao Se along. On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 22 少年歌行
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. His first heroic deed does not go as planned since he ended up owing the owner Xiao Se a debt for the damages to his place. Left with no choice, Lei Wu Jie takes Xiao Se along. On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

programme.title: C. L. I. F. 5 - EP 11 警徽天职之海岸卫队
programme.desc: An assassination occurs during a press conference on the collaboration between Lucas and the Prince of the Middle East and chaos ensues. The culprit manages to escape despite Man Ting's pursuit. The Prince's doctor, Dr Johnson, is shot and sent to the hospital. A car accident occurs en route and the wounded Dr Johnson alights from the ambulance and leaves...

programme.title: C. L. I. F. 5 - EP 12 警徽天职之海岸卫队
programme.desc: Jia Ming finds a USB inside Man Ting's bag but she claims that it does not belong to her. Jia Ming brings the encrypted USB home and unlocks it. He passes the USB to Xiao Tian when he realises it is Jess' vaccine formula. Now all that is left to be found is the poison gas formula. Jia Hao uses Dr Johnson's family to threaten him into revealing the formula. He relents and gives in.

programme.title: King Of Culinary - EP 9 三把刀1
programme.desc: Last week, the battle between two Nonya dishes left sparks in the studio. Will Chef Eric Neo be able to keep his knives intact? Next up, a challenger specially flew back from overseas to pit her culinary skills against our celebrity chef. And she is using a recipe handed down by her Grandpa. We will also be witnessing the most composed challenger to date. Despite the immense pressure of the competition, she appears to be very much at ease cooking away in our "arena kitchen".

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 16 前线追踪
programme.desc: Lightning strikes have been making headlines. A lightning strike survivor recounts the terrifying moment it happened. With El Niño here, could thunderstorms become less frequent? Meanwhile, authorities are stepping up rodent control with the help of artificial intelligence, and the number of rat burrows has fallen by about 40%. But is that enough to solve the problem once and for all?

programme.title: No Other Way - EP 15 至死不渝
programme.desc: Hongtao is suspected of inciting murder after police find evidence in his home. Shiyuan provides a recording revealing Jialin as the mastermind. Keying suspects Shuheng is emotionally scarred, and Dr. Su offers to help. Shuheng recalls how Jialin humiliated Wanqing while Hongtao coldly stood by. After Hongtao is released, Shuheng punches him.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 79 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Heavenly Hand - EP 23 麻雀乐团
programme.desc: Xiao Cheng falsely claims that he is dating Cheng Qing after being intimidated by Situ Jiu, causing Cheng Qing to worry about the misunderstanding. Ouyang Zong joins Jia Ming's cello class, hinting that he may have a hidden agenda.

programme.title: Focus - EP 16 焦点
programme.desc: Across Southeast Asia, more people are redefining where—and how—they choose to live and work. From long-term residency seekers in Malaysia to digital nomads in Bali and Chiang Mai, this series follows individuals pursuing new beginnings, meaningful connections, and a different pace of life, while exploring how their journeys are reshaping the communities they now call home.

programme.title: 100% Wife - EP 70 金家好媳妇
programme.desc: Shuyun forces Youcai and Zhilin to return to Kaohsiung with her. Guanda tries to appease Shuyun and treats them to a farewell dinner so that Zhilin can meet Yanjun privately.

programme.title: 100% Wife - EP 71 金家好媳妇
programme.desc: Yanjun and Zhilin agree to remain as siblings, and Zhilin decides to stay in Taipei. Qianqian breathes a sigh of relief when she learns that the fortune teller has given the wrong birth date.

Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision. 日常双效保养组合，同时守护筋骨与视力。筋骨丸采用日本贝类萃取钙、鱼胶原蛋白与软骨素，强化骨骼、维持关节灵活；亮目丸精选日本蓝莓、胡萝卜与叶黄素，帮助过滤蓝光、缓解眼睛疲劳，维持清晰视力。天然配方、每日补充，让骨骼稳、关节顺、双眼更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE’s Bio-Ray Knee Guard with Tourmaline
programme.desc: The knee guard provides firm support and gentle compression around the kneecap to stabilize joints and reduce strain. Infused with Bio-Ray technology and tourmaline warmth, it promotes circulation, eases stiffness, and delivers lasting comfort. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear. 护膝提供膝盖周围稳固支撑与轻柔加压，分担关节压力，减少磨损。结合日本生化能技术与托玛琳微热作用，促进血气循环、舒缓僵硬, 让膝盖在日常走动、运动中都保持稳定与健康， 降低磨损和退化风险。 透气材质，天天戴都舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HQ Ling Zhi
programme.desc: HQ Lingzhi Cracked Spores Powder is formulated and manufactured in Singapore. It enhances the body’s immune system, reduces fatigue, promotes blood circulation, protects the liver, and improves metabolism. HQ 灵芝破壁孢子粉由新加坡配制和生产。它能够增强身体的免疫系统，减少疲劳，促进血液循环，保护肝脏，并改善新陈代谢。
